androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Keep messages even after they are deleted for everyone

androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: Browse and manage all captured deleted content
androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: View Deleted Messages

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Show a real-time alert when a message is revoked
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Notify on Deletion

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Freeze your last seen timestamp at the current moment
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Freeze Last Seen

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Show you as online even when WhatsApp is closed
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Always Online

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Double-tap a message to react with a custom emoji
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Double-Tap to React

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Play voice notes without showing the played receipt
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Hide Voice Note Seen

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: View 'View Once' media unlimited times privately
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Stealth View Once
